zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Sheffield於大約1456年出生在英國林可爾史爾巴特維其可時，她的父親Sir Robert Sheffield22歲，母親Genette Lound20歲。她於1477年與Hamon Sutton III在英國林可爾史爾伯頓 白 林肯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1525年10月1日之前在英國林可爾史爾伯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Sheffield于大约1456年出生在英国林可爾史爾巴特維其可时，她的父亲Sir Robert Sheffield22岁，母亲Genette Lound20岁。她于1477年与Hamon Sutton III在英国林可爾史爾伯頓 白 林肯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1525年10月1日之前在英国林可爾史爾伯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Sheffield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Sheffield (Yorkshire), but perhaps also from Sheffield Bottom in Burghfield (Berkshire), or Sheffield Park in Fletching (Sussex). The Yorkshire place takes its name from the river Sheaf, itself from Old English scēath ‘boundary’, + Old English feld ‘open country’, while the Berkshire placename derives from Old English scēo ‘shelter’ + feld. The Sussex placename comes from Old English scēap ‘sheep’ + feld.

variants.name: Shuffield
meanings: English: variant of   Sheffield  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Sheffield was born about 1456, in Butterwick, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Sir Robert Sheffield, was 22 and her mother, Genette Lound, was 20. She married Hamon Sutton III in 1477, in Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. She died before 1 October 1525, in Burton, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Sheffield est née environ 1456, à Butterwick, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Sheffield, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Genette Lound, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Hamon Sutton III en 1477, à Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1 octobre 1525, à Burton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Sheffield um 1456 in Butterwick, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Sheffield 22 und ihre Mutter Genette Lound 20. Sie hat 1477 in Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England Hamon Sutton III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1. Oktober 1525 in Burton, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Sheffield è nata il circa 1456 nel Butterwick, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Sir Robert Sheffield, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Genette Lound, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Hamon Sutton III nel 1477, nel Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì prima del 1 ottobre 1525, nel Burton, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Sheffieldが約1456年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブッテルウィックで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Sheffieldは22歳，母Genette Loundは20歳であった。1477年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブルトン ビー リンコルンでHamon Sutton IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1525年10月1日以前にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブルトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Sheffield(이)가 대략 1456년 영국 링코실르 버터윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Sheffield(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Genette Lound(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1477년 영국 링코실르 버턴 비 링코컨에서 Hamon Sutton III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1525년 10월 1일 이전 영국 링코실르 버턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Sheffield nasceu aproximadamente 1456, em Butterwick, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Sheffield, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Genette Lound, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Hamon Sutton III em 1477, em Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 1 de outubro de 1525, em Burton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Sheffield родилась около 1456 г. в местности буттирвикк, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Sheffield было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Genette Lound, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hamon Sutton III в 1477 г. в местности буртон би линколн, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла перед 1 октябрь 1525 г. в местности буртон, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Sheffield nació aproximadamente 1456, en Butterwick, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Sheffield, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Genette Lound, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Hamon Sutton III en 1477, en Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió antes de 1 de octubre de 1525, en Burton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
